focus_tree = {
    id = editor_tree
    continuous_focus_position = {
        x = 150
        y = 275
    }
    inlay_window = {
        id = test_inlay
        position = {
            x = 300
            y = 400
        }
    }
    focus = {
        id = ROOT
        x = 1
        y = 2
        offset = {
            x = 3
            y = 4
            trigger = {
                has_government = democratic
            }
        }
    }
    focus = {
        id = CHILD
        x = 5
        y = 6
        relative_position_id = ROOT
    }
    focus = {
        id = INSERTED
    }
}
